response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer with a strong, hands-on technical background and clear entrepreneurial spirit. He meets the minimum years of experience and has some recent, relevant exposure to AI agent infrastructure. However, his resume does not align with the director-level seniority or the deep, strategic AI focus required for this Principal Engineer role. His experience is primarily that of a highly-skilled Senior/Staff implementer, not a high-level strategist with recognized expertise in building AI-powered platforms.
strengths: Extensive and diverse technical experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded) and languages.
Demonstrates strong initiative and entrepreneurial spirit through founding and maintaining the GISCollective platform.
Community involvement through workshops and talks shows a passion for sharing knowledge.
concerns: Experience is at the Senior/Staff level, which does not match the Director-level seniority of the Principal role.
AI experience is very recent and appears limited, lacking the deep, demonstrated expertise in building AI products required.
Resume focuses heavily on hands-on implementation rather than the high-level strategic planning and customer advisory responsibilities of the role.
